name: Santa Ana Unified School District
districtFact: Santa Ana Unified serves students in Santa Ana and nearby Orange County communities. The district academic calendar separates elementary, intermediate, high school, and educational options dates, so families should check grade-span notes before planning around student-free days or modified days.

about.title: About Santa Ana Unified School District
about.content: Santa Ana Unified School District serves Santa Ana and nearby Orange County families with an academic calendar that includes the first day of service, first day of instruction, last day of instruction, student holidays, recesses, parent conference windows, duty days, grading periods, and modified-day notes. Families often use the SAUSD school schedule to plan childcare, transportation, appointments, school holidays, and campus-specific activities.

about.title: How to Use This SAUSD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide first day, last day, holidays, Thanksgiving recess, winter break, spring recess, and major student-free days. Then confirm elementary, intermediate, high school, and educational options details with SAUSD and your school because some dates apply only to specific grade spans or programs.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Santa Ana Unified Families
content: Check whether a date applies to elementary, intermediate, high school, or educational options before planning childcare.
Add parent conference weeks separately because elementary conferences use modified days in November and March.
Review modified-day notes near semester endings because early schedules can vary by grade span.
Use the official SAUSD school calendars page for revised PDFs and campus-specific updates.

compareIntro: Compare the Santa Ana Unified school calendar with Irvine Unified, Garden Grove Unified, Long Beach Unified, and Los Angeles Unified calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring recess so Orange County and Southern California families can compare nearby district schedules.

districtFaqs.q: Does every Santa Ana Unified school follow exactly the same dates?
districtFaqs.a: The district publishes one academic calendar, but it includes separate notes for elementary, intermediate, high school, and educational options. Families should confirm grade-span and campus-specific dates with their school.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute Santa Ana Unified calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official SAUSD school calendars page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Santa Ana Unified.

customSections.label: Does Every SAUSD School Follow the Same Calendar?
customSections.content: Most districtwide Santa Ana Unified dates are shared across schools, including the first day of instruction, major holidays, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Break, Spring Recess, and the last day of instruction. Some details can vary by grade span or program, including elementary parent conferences, intermediate and high school modified days, educational options quarters, campus events, athletics, and testing schedules. Families should confirm school-specific dates before planning appointments, travel, or childcare.

customSections.label: Planning Around the SAUSD 2026-2027 Calendar
customSections.content: The SAUSD 2026-2027 calendar helps families plan important school-year activities around the Santa Ana Unified academic calendar and SAUSD school schedule.

groups.label: Back-to-school planning
items: Families may want to complete enrollment, transportation arrangements, school supply preparation, and after-school plans before the first instructional day.

groups.label: Holiday travel
items: Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027.

groups.label: Spring planning
items: Spring Recess takes place April 5-9, 2027, which is a common period for family travel and childcare planning.
Elementary parent conferences, modified days, athletics, and testing schedules should still be checked separately with each campus.

groups.label: End-of-year preparation
items: The final instructional day is May 26, 2027.
The official PDF also lists duty days after the final instructional day, so families should separate student dates from staff service dates.

customSections.label: How We Verify SAUSD Calendar Information
customSections.content: MySchoolDates verifies Santa Ana Unified calendar pages from official district publications before publishing this reference page. The district calendar remains the authoritative source for late revisions, emergency updates, and campus-specific notices.

groups.label: Verification sources
items: Calendar pages are reviewed when new official documents become available.

customSections.label: How to Add the SAUSD Calendar to Google Calendar
customSections.content: Download the SAUSD Calendar 2026-2027 ICS file if you want a one-time calendar import for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook. The file is not an official live sync, so families should still check SAUSD for revisions.

groups.label: Import steps
items: Download the calendar file from the calendar download section.
Open Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook.
Choose import or add calendar from file.
Upload the ICS file and review the imported school dates.
